title: Love and Larceny
overview: Gerardo, an aspiring actor, trying unsuccessfully to cross over from comedy to tragedy, is involved, due to his ability to mimic dialects of Italy, in a scam concocted by Lallo against a rich cloth-merchant.

trailers.title: Il Mattatore (L'Homme aux cent visages) de Dino Risi : bande-annonce 2017
